subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses, made manifest the clear proofs, illumined the way for those possessed of certitude, and given utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات و اوضح السبیل لاصحاب الدلیل و انطق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
